info.title: Relay Gateway API
info.description: OpenAI-compatible, multi-tenant LLM gateway. Data-plane (/v1/*) surface.

get.description: Requires a Logto JWT: `Authorization: Bearer <token>` with the `relay:read` scope. Returns 401 without a valid token and 403 without the scope.

post.summary: Onboard a new organization (Logto org + entitlements + admin invite)
Suspend an organization (data plane rejects its keys ≤1s later)
Advance the onboarding state machine one step
Issue a virtual key (plaintext returned once)

get.summary: List an application’s virtual keys (never returns secrets)

post.summary: Rotate a key: issue a successor, grace the predecessor
Revoke a key immediately (data plane rejects it ≤1s later)
Store a provider credential (sealed on write, never returned)
Create a chat completion (streaming or non-streaming)
post.description: OpenAI-compatible. Requires a virtual key: `Authorization: Bearer rk_live_…`. With `stream:true` the response is an SSE stream of `chat.completion.chunk` events.

200.description: A chat.completion object, or an SSE stream when stream=true.

schema.description: A chat.completion object, or an SSE stream when stream=true.

tags.name: tenancy
tags.description: Platform control plane: org lifecycle + entitlements
